title: WebSocket Message
description: Schema describing a complete WebSocket message. A message may consist of one or more frames and carries either text or binary data between endpoints.

type.description: The type of the message, determined by the opcode of the first frame. Text messages contain UTF-8 data; binary messages contain raw bytes.

data.description: The message payload. For text messages this is a UTF-8 string. For binary messages this is base64-encoded binary data.

size.description: The size of the message payload in bytes.

fragmented.description: Whether the message was delivered across multiple frames using fragmentation.

compressed.description: Whether the message was compressed using a negotiated extension such as permessage-deflate.

timestamp.description: The time at which the message was sent or received.
